title: sebastiania riedelii
intro: Sebastiania riedelii, also known as the 'Riedel's Sebastiania' or 'Riedel's Croton', is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sebastiania riedelii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
